annotations.reason: Governs any request that would supply or act on a medication dose, requiring confirmation against the current prescription before use.
Governs requests that confirm or initiate money movement, not passive lookups of a recorded invoice total.
Governs requests for the office Wi-Fi password, directing to the current rotated value held by IT rather than chat history.
Governs any release of donor or personal data to a third party, requiring verifiable named authorization rather than relayed approval.
Governs requests about what access or reach a seat gets, especially payment-capable systems, requiring confirmation against the current access matrix.
